headline: Waters Corp (NYSE:WAT) Shows Strong Growth and Technical Setup
summary: Waters Corp (WAT) shows strong growth with accelerating revenue and EPS, solid profitability, and a favorable technical setup near a breakout at $379.76. The stock combines fundamental strength with a high setup rating for disciplined growth investors.

headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks to Keep an Eye On and 1 We Ignore
summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.
